copy-schemas.description: Copy executor JSON schemas to dist so NX can locate them at runtime

build.command: cd nx-graph-to-mermaid && rm -rf dist && tsc --noCheck && mkdir -p dist/executors/generate && cp src/executors/generate/schema.json dist/executors/generate/schema.json
//: --noCheck (TS 5.5+): emit JS without type checking — fast transpile-only build.
Type correctness is enforced by the developer's IDE and by check-types in CI.
See build-tools-workspace/project.json check-types and nx.json for the full picture.
--noEmit: run the full type checker but write nothing to disk.
This is the CI gate that catches what the IDE should have caught locally.
We do NOT use --noCheck here — that would defeat the purpose.
dependsOn ^build ensures dependency .d.ts files exist before we typecheck.
Uses tsconfig.test.json which includes tests/ in addition to src/.
Kept separate from check-prod-types so test-only type errors
do not affect the production build path.
Aggregates prod and test type checking for this package.
check-test-types covers tests/ (not published but still type-checked).
